# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- On the homepage, the member login link should always be fixed at the very bottom and styled grey/subtle so it is not obvious.
- The SPEAR logo should fill the entire front page as a transparent background.
- The section order on the homepage should be: Introduction first, then full band image, followed by The Sound section, followed by Shows, Music, Videos, Bio, Gallery, and Contact.
- Upcoming shows should use a square visual block instead of repeating the band picture.
- The Videos section should show only three square video thumbnails with no text labels/captions and link to [Cursed Into Oblivion's YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@CursedIntoOblivion).
- The contact email should be Cursedintooblivion00@gmail.com.
